steps.title: Translate the conditions into a system of equations
steps.content: The two pieces sum to the total length: $$x + y = 44$$ And $x$ is 8 more than 3 times $y$: $$x = 3y + 8$$

steps.title: Substitute and solve for x
steps.content:
Since the second equation gives $x$ in terms of $y$, substitute into the first:
$$(3y + 8) + y = 44$$
$$4y + 8 = 44$$
$$4y = 36$$
$$y = 9$$
Therefore: $x = 3(9) + 8 = 27 + 8 = 35$.
